text:

commit 43b3f5b22d284b53a7ebcd7bf2fe3811111062bb
Author:     Michiel van Baak Jansen <michiel@vanbaak.eu>
AuthorDate: 2024-05-16 15:40:31 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2024-05-17 06:44:51 +0000

    net-p2p/readarr: Update to 0.3.27.2538

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/Readarr/Readarr/releases/tag/v0.3.27.2538

     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Refactor PasswordInput to use type password
     * Use number input for seed ratio [ #3470 ]
     * Fixed: Notifications with only On Rename enabled
     * Fixed: Parsing long downloading/seeding values from Transmission
     * Multiple Translations updated by Weblate
     * Fixed: Indexer flags for torrent release pushes
     * Forward X-Forwarded-Host header

    PR:             279035
    Reported by:    michiel@vanbaak.eu (maintainer)
